title: Pink axolotl of undying
description: New texture of totem of undying
body:
# This texture pack that replaces totem of undying to **pink axolotl of undying**
Suitable for all axolotl fans (especially pink ones)

# **Warning!!!**
There may be some visual bugs. I hope there won't be any, but anything is possible. If you find any, please let me know. (On GitHub in the future)
